name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Small Zigzag Shoulder Bag. The twisted structure cowhide backpack is unrecognizable as a new BV at first glance, only featuring the classic weave on the strap, making the bag simple and casual yet still stylish. Paired with autumn wear, it instantly recalls last year's popular Mocha style.
